# Spec — 2026-05-13

## Executive Summary

- **anthropics/claude-code** (v2.1.140): Incremental fixes release — case/separator-insensitive `subagent_type` matching; fixed `/goal` hanging when hooks disabled; fixed `/loop` redundant wakeups; fixed `Read` tool validation for whitespace-padded offset; fixed background service race conditions; plugin warnings for silently ignored default component folders
- **Kilo-Org/kilocode** (v7.2.52, ~50 commits): `{file:...}` syntax for agent markdown prompts with `escapeJson` control; visual diff for skipped patch sections; EEXIST fix for recursive mkdir on Windows/NTFS reparse points; minimum release age for bun dependencies (supply-chain security); mode model selection sync fix; Mermaid node labels fix for DOMPurify; Codex expired auth recovery
- **cline/cline** (~50 commits): Full SDK documentation (27 pages) and monorepo merge of `@clinebot/sdk`; `ClineCore` as primary harness with `Agent` as primitive; hide teammate/subagent sessions from history by default; kanban command and notice dialog; CLI compaction mode with provider auth preservation; CLI 3.0.0 release preparation; OpenRouter double-counting usage fix; SDK live provider test concurrency
- **aider-ai/aider**: No new commits in last 7 days (latest: Apr 25)
- **continuedev/continue**: No new commits in last 7 days (latest: Apr 17)
- **Key new pattern**: Cline's SDK architecture — separating core orchestration (`ClineCore`) from lightweight agent primitive (`Agent`) as distinct runtime tiers. Our orchestrator is monolithic with no SDK/embeddable layer
- **Key new pattern**: Subagent session isolation in history — Cline now hides teammate/subagent sessions from the main history list by default. Our session manager shows all sessions flat without hierarchy filtering
- **Gap persists (from yesterday)**: Goal-directed autonomous mode, hook `continueOnBlock` rejection feedback, MCP project directory env var — these remain unimplemented and still the highest priority items
- **Supply-chain security**: Both Kilo (bun `minimumReleaseAge`) and Claude Code (pinned GitHub Actions to commit SHAs) shipped supply-chain hardening this week. We have no equivalent dependency freshness gating

## What to build (prioritized)

### 1. Hook Rejection Feedback Loop (continueOnBlock)
- **What**: Add `continueOnBlock` option to PostToolUse hooks — when a hook rejects tool execution, feed the rejection reason back to the model as an error message so it self-corrects instead of halting
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139 shipped this, and v2.1.140 fixed edge cases (hooks disabled). Our hooks system (`src/hooks/index.ts`) fires events and returns results but has no path to feed rejection back into the orchestrator's conversation. This enables guardrail patterns ("don't write to production") where the model retries with corrected parameters
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 `continueOnBlock`; v2.1.140 fix for `/goal` hanging when hooks disabled
- **Category**: config
- **Size**: medium (1-2 days)

### 2. Subagent Session Hierarchy & Filtering
- **What**: Add parent/child relationship tracking to sessions and filter subagent sessions from the default history view. Show them only when explicitly requested or when viewing a parent session's details
- **Why**: Cline shipped `fix(core): hide teammate sessions from history by default` this week. Our `src/core/sessionManager.ts` stores all sessions flat — when using the task/agent tools, spawned subagent sessions clutter the history. Users want to see only their root sessions by default
- **Source**: cline/cline #10662 — "Filter teammate/subagent sessions out of session history unless explicitly requested"
- **Category**: core
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### 3. MCP Project Directory Environment Variable
- **What**: Pass `ALEXI_PROJECT_DIR` to MCP stdio server child processes, resolved from the current working directory or project root detection
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139 ships `CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR` to MCP servers. Our `src/mcp/client.ts:connectStdio` spawns servers with `process.env` plus user-defined `config.env` but no project directory. MCP servers that need relative path resolution (file-based tools, git tools) must have paths hardcoded in config
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 — "MCP stdio servers now receive `CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR`"
- **Category**: mcp
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### 4. Compaction Instruction Preservation
- **What**: Enhance the compaction summary prompt (`src/compaction/index.ts:SUMMARY_PROMPT`) to explicitly instruct the model to preserve sensitive user instructions (API keys, coding preferences, project constraints, file paths marked important) during summarization
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139 shipped instruction-preserving compaction. Cline added provider auth preservation for manual `/compact`. Our compaction prompt is generic — it asks for a "concise summary" without directing the model to retain user-specified constraints or sensitive instructions that affect future behavior
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 — "Compaction prompt now asks the model to preserve sensitive user instructions"; cline/cline #23 — "Preserve provider auth for CLI manual /compact"
- **Category**: core
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### 5. Agent Observability Headers (OTEL Tracing)
- **What**: When making LLM API requests from subagents, inject `x-alexi-agent-id` and `x-alexi-parent-agent-id` headers. Extend existing `src/providers/sessionHeaders.ts` to include agent hierarchy identification alongside session affinity
- **Why**: Claude Code v2.1.139 traces all subagent API calls with hierarchy headers. Our session headers (`sessionHeaders.ts`) track session affinity but not agent identity within a session. Multi-agent debugging requires knowing which agent in the hierarchy originated each API call
- **Source**: anthropics/claude-code v2.1.139 — "API requests from subagents carry `x-claude-code-agent-id` / `x-claude-code-parent-agent-id`"
- **Category**: provider
- **Size**: small (< 4h)
